title: Oryzopsis macounii
taxonomy: Oryzopsis macounii is classified under the family Poaceae. This family of plants includes various types of grasses. Within the Poaceae family, Oryzopsis macounii is a member of the genus Oryzopsis. The genus Oryzopsis is a group of perennial grasses native to western North America. Oryzopsis macounii is specifically native to the mountainous regions of British Columbia, Canada.
